items.title: Rare discovery of ambergris on Denmark beach excites scientists and historians

items.summary: Travis Head reminds cricket fans of what he can produce with the bat, as he helps Sunrisers Hyderabad to a six-wicket win over Mumbai Indians.

items.title: Australians urged to stand up for Murray River as 'transformational moment' looms

items.title: Six WA Police officers sanctioned over treatment of Aboriginal man who died in Kalgoorlie prison
items.summary: Six WA Police officers have been sanctioned over their treatment of a man in their custody who later died in prison, after the ABC revealed a constable dismissed his threat of suicide, and laughed at news of his death.

items.title: NT diphtheria outbreak worsens as cases of the potentially deadly disease more than double
items.summary: Cases of a deadly, vaccine-preventable strain of diphtheria have now risen to 18, after the Centre for Disease Control first declared an outbreak last month.

items.title: Anastasia Potapova reaches Madrid Open semifinals to make WTA Tour history
items.summary: Anastasia Potapova experiences an "explosion of emotions", as her remarkable run in Madrid continues at the prestigious tournament.

items.title: Antisemitism and social cohesion royal commission launched after Bondi Beach terror attack to release interim report
items.summary: The Royal Commission into Antisemitism and Social Cohesion will deliver its first report, two months after it began and less than six months after the Bondi Beach terror attack.

items.title: New study suggests majority of regional Australians back renewable energy transition

items.title: Technology should make life easier but it doesn't always for people with disability

items.title: Will the OPEC oil cartel survive without the UAE?

items.title: The vine with a murky past that is strangling Vanuatu's forests

items.title: US Supreme Court curbs race-based voting maps in landmark ruling

items.title: The six weeks from hell that whipped New South Wales into State of Origin shape

items.title: Tigers, Eagles or Cockle Divers — what makes up an Australian Rules football club's name?

items.title: Rebel Wilson accused of dumping her phone to avoid handing over key texts as part of defamation trial
items.summary: Ms Wilson's lawyers have previously told Federal Court defamation hearing that her phone was stolen and she was unable to produce all of her WhatsApp message history.

items.title: Ultra-swimmer Andy Donaldson sets world record with 55km Ord River challenge

items.title: New theatre hopes to attract audiences as remote Queensland town grapples with tourism crisis
items.summary: A potentially 'catastrophic' drop in traffic has outback residents concerned for the rest of the tourist season. Community members in remote Queensland have come together for the grand opening of a new outdoor theatre and a ribbon-cutting ceremony, declaring their town open for business.

items.title: Australian actor Megan Wilding stars in Game. Set. Match, a play that feels like tennis

items.title: US regulator orders review of ABC licence after Donald Trump criticises Jimmy Kimmel

items.title: VicGrid surveyors cancel access visit after farmgate protest makes them feel unsafe
items.summary: Renewable planning body VicGrid has threatened a high-profile anti-transmission-line campaigner with enforcement action after government surveyors felt "hindered" from accessing his farm.

items.title: Lions star Oscar Allen sidelined for 12-14 weeks with foot injury
items.summary: The Lions' win over the Crows on Sunday has come at a price, with one of their major off-season signings rule out for much of the season.

items.title: Hundreds of jobs to go at Home Affairs department in voluntary redundancy drive
items.summary: The secretary of the second-largest department says she has been trying to reduce headcount by natural attrition, but that further job cuts are needed by the end of the financial year to fit within the department's budget.

items.summary: Ricky Ponting's Punjab Kings record a six-wicket loss against Rajasthan Royals in the IPL, despite Marcus Stoinis's breathtaking innings.

items.title: Self-employment can help autistic people avoid workplace barriers

items.title: El Niño warming could be unprecedented, but don't assume record drought in Australia
